raw_title: Book Review: ‘Go Gentle,’ by Maria Semple
description: “Go Gentle” throws together art heists, sexual assault and a coven of middle-aged divorcées on the Upper West Side.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘See You on the Other Side,’ by Jay McInerney
book_title: ‘See You on the Other Side,’ by Jay McInerney
description: Jay McInerney has written about the literary party boy Russell Calloway once a decade since the 1990s. He returns in the Covid novel “See You on the Other Side.”

raw_title: Book Review: ‘The Future Is Peace,’ by Aziz Abu Sarah and Maoz Inon
book_title: ‘The Future Is Peace,’ by Aziz Abu Sarah and Maoz Inon
description: Aziz Abu Sarah and Maoz Inon both lost loved ones to the conflict in the Middle East. In “The Future Is Peace,” they look for hope and understanding.
